prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: rarity badge icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for three rarity badges.
Subject: three compact fantasy badges in one horizontal row: common bronze/stone badge, uncommon silver/blue badge, rare gold/violet jewel badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game UI icons, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: three equal badges centered in cells with padding.
Color palette: bronze, silver-blue, gold-violet.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is the actual badge component; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside badge artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
